rulings.Case Title: KEIKO HATTORI et al VS. KIYOKO TAKATA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Referee'S Motion For Court Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 3, 2013, line 5. -Referee's Motion For Court Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property. Referee's Motion for Court Confirmation of Sale of Real Property. Hearing Required. Moving party is ordered to present Proof of Service of this Motion at the hearing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 3, 2013, line 1. -DEFENDANTS KIMBERLY HATHAWAY and JOHN HOFFMANS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal filed on August 29, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. NICOLE LAQUA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion On Stipulation To Restrict Access To Court File
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 3, 2013, line 2. -DEFENDANT NICOLE LAQUA'S motion On Stipulation To Restrict Access To Court File. Defendant's Motion on Stipulation to Restrict Access to Court File is GRANTED. Defendant complied with Settlement agreement one month before expiration of CCP 1161.2 restriction. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ANGELA M CLARK et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 3, 2013, line 4. - DEFENDANT ANGELA CLARK'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment. Hearing Required. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: ELEANOR MALUNAY VS. JENNY VEGA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 3, 2013, line 3. -DEFENDANTS JENNY VEGA and LUIS FIERROS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. First Amended Complaint is based on notice that was served after the action was filed. No leave to file supplemental complaint was granted. = (501/REQ)
